caption: The video features a graphic layout with a split-screen aesthetic. On the left, a white background displays the logo "TFNN.com" and the phrase "EDUCATING INVESTORS." To the right, a darker segment shows a blurred image of a laptop, keyboard, and desk, overlaid with the text "The Opening Call" and "Basil Chapman." Below these sections, a banner reads "THE OPENING CALL NEWSLETTER." A blue ticker at the bottom lists "Basil Chapman" and "The Tiger Technicians Hour | June 8th, 2022," alongside a partial "SUBSCRIBE" button. As the sequence progresses, the scene remains static until the final frame, where the right side of the image undergoes a dramatic vertical motion blur, creating a streaking effect that obscures the background image and the "The Opening Call" text, while the rest of the layout remains clear.
